Testing adding a new post about TADs.

The goal would be to develop an interactive dashboard where folks could see...

- the projected revenue lost to APS, COA, Fulton County by TAD extensions

  - split up by TAD, also adjustable by year

    - pre-sets - closing as planned, mayor's proposal (initial), mayor's proposal current

    - tables showing prior revenue changes, growth rates

- you can toggle TADs via the map

- you can toggle other features like closed schools

- you can compare money taken from the school district with what it could be used to pay for, e.g. closed schools for efficiency sake; additional teachers, raises, bilingual assistants, etc.

- think about whether there are zoom in prospects for each TAD, e.g. comparing property value tax growth over time, displacement?, affordable housing, avg. rents?

data sources include -

- historic tax digest information

- initial redevelopment plans
